channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
item.description: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

item.title: How to watch Germany vs Paraguay: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Julian Nagelsmann seeks improvement
item.description: Here's how to watch Germany vs Paraguay for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, with a place in the last-16 at stake in Boston.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra : des coques confirment les noms et le design des pliables Samsung
item.description: Des coques de protection publiées par erreur confirment les noms et le design des prochains pliables de Samsung, attendus le 22 juillet. Le grand modèle change bien de nom.

item.title: The LG StanbyME 2 Max is a standalone 32-inch touchscreen display that costs $1,300
item.description: If you want a 4K display you can easily move around the house, LG has you covered.

item.title: The first Fitbit Air update could fix a major frustration — but Google has shut off a workaround for avoiding the new Google Health app
item.description: Your Fitbit Air is about to get more reliable and accurate, but there's bad news if you're still clinging to the old Fitbit app.

item.title: Nvidia relance la RTX 3060 12 Go en 2026, disponible à partir de 330 €
item.description: La GeForce RTX 3060 12 Go de Nvidia est de nouveau en stock, cinq ans après sa sortie. Le hic, c'est le prix : 333,64 € en Allemagne, soit plus cher que des cartes plus récentes et plus rapides.

item.title: Tidal isn't banning AI music, but it won't pay people who upload it
item.description: Tidal's new policy says that 100-percent AI-generated music will be demonetized.

item.title: WhatsApp ouvre la réservation des noms de profil : voici comment garder le vôtre
item.description: WhatsApp ouvre ce 29 juin les réservations de noms de profil. L’idée : pouvoir discuter sans donner son numéro de téléphone, comme sur Telegram ou Signal depuis des années.

item.title: Over 14 million login credentials leaked from six ISPs in major data breach — here’s what we know
item.description: The credentials were exposed via an attack on third-party software.

item.title: Shop for a new mattress during 4th of July sales when you can take up to 60% off
item.description: Take up to 60% a new mattress from Purple, Casper, DreamCloud, and more during 4th of July mattress sales.

item.title: Why spend MacBook money on a creator laptop when this HP Victus with Ryzen 7 and RTX 4050 graphics is $525 off at Best Buy?
item.description: Why spend MacBook money when the HP Victus has the power most creators need and it's $525 off right now?

item.title: Test du GMKtec EVO-X2 : AMD Strix Halo, 128 Go de RAM unifiée et un iGPU au niveau d’une RTX 4060
item.description: Avec son AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395, ses 128 Go de mémoire unifiée et son iGPU Radeon 8060S capable de faire tourner un modèle de 120 milliards de paramètres en local, le GMKtec EVO-X2 dépasse largement le cadre du mini PC classique. C'est une station d'IA locale dans un boîtier d'à peine plus d'un litre.

item.title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
item.description: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

item.title: Dbrand's Companion Cube case for the Steam Machine was a lie
item.description: Dbrand did not do its homework when it made the Companion Cube case for the Steam Machine.

item.title: Xbox disputes claims GTA 6 is selling 8x more copies on PlayStation, but I'm not convinced it's doing great
item.description: First a console price hike, now IGN claims PS5 game sales are eight times higher than they are on Xbox.

item.title: J’ai testé le Sony A7R VI : la définition reine, la vitesse en prime (et un prix qui pique)
item.description: 66,8 mégapixels sur capteur plein format empilé, processeur BIONZ XR2, rafale à 30 images par seconde en RAW 14 bits : le Sony A7R VI fait parler la poudre. Mais à 5 099 euros, c'est aussi le prix le plus élevé jamais demandé pour un A7R. La facture est salée, mais la promesse est inédite : jamais un boîtier de cette définition n'avait atteint une telle vitesse. ...

item.title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
item.description: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new capacity in the U.S.

item.title: The attack that hijacked Claude Code came through Sentry. Datadog, PagerDuty, and Jira have the same exposure.
item.description: A single fake error report hijacked Claude Code in controlled testing — the agent ran the attacker's code with the developer's full privileges, and not one alert fired. EDR, WAF, IAM, and the firewall all missed it completely.Tenet Security's June agentjacking disclosure describes a single crafted Sentry error event — sent through a public credential that requires no breach and no authentication — that injected attacker instructions into error data that Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex then executed as trusted diagnostic output. Tenet tested 100-plus targets in controlled conditions and achieved...

item.title: Tidal just drew a line in the sand on AI music — 100% AI-generated tracks won’t earn royalties on the music streaming platform
item.description: Tidal wants to stem the tide of AI-generated music, and is "currently working with an external partner to manage detection"

item.title: Netflix impose un e-mail par profil : le partage familial tranquille, c’est fini
item.description: Netflix impose une adresse e-mail unique par profil. Pour votre sécurité, dit la plateforme. Pour préparer la prochaine étape de son modèle tarifaire, répond l'architecture du système.

item.title: 30 years later, my Hotmail email address still works, even though I won't read your message if you email me there
item.description: Hotmail turns 30, but it's barely a shadow of its former self. I look at how the service started when Microsoft did with it and how it sort of lives on.

item.title: HP's 4th of July sale cuts up to 45% off laptops for hybrid work and back-to-school — but the clock's ticking on the one I'd buy with my own money
item.description: A flash sale and some big discounts on HP's laptops for work and study.

item.title: The best July 4th sales we found so far
item.description: July 4th sales are typically a precursor to what we’d see during a mid-July Prime Day, but obviously things are flipped around this year. Last week’s big Prime Day sale is over, yet there are a number of familiar deals still poking around in the week leading up to the nation’s birthday. Best Buy is […]

item.title: T-Mobile will automatically upgrade some legacy phone plans to higher-price plans
item.description: Thousands of T-Mobile subscribers are being automatically switched to new plans, with some facing a price bump of around $4 per line.

item.title: Nvidia’s AI chip sales are stalling in China. Here’s who’s gaining market share
item.description: According to industry analysts, Huawei’s most advanced AI chips are comparable to Nvidia’s H200 series. In the race between the U.S. and China to develop artificial intelligence, the battle over hardware and computing power is heating up as Chinese companies like Huawei overtake global industry leaders like Nvidia in their home market.Jensen Huang, the CEO of computer chip giant Nvidia, was mobbed by onlookers as he hit the streets for the “zhajiangmian” noodles while visiting Beijing during U.S. President Donald Trump’s May summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping. But his celebrity status has n...

item.title: This curved MSI MAG 242C monitor is now under $100, making it the budget productivity upgrade for your home office setup — but this Best Buy deal ends soon
item.description: 180Hz, 1ms MPRT, Adaptive Sync, built-in speakers, and a fully ergonomic stand — the MSI MAG 242C is under a hundred bucks.

item.title: Qui dit été dit randonnées à vélo, et pourquoi pas avec ce VTC électrique haut de gamme Stilus E-Touring soldé chez Decathlon ?
item.description: Le Stilus E-Touring est un VTC électrique haut de gamme axé sur le confort, pour de longues promenades, à retrouver pour 2 969 euros au lieu de 3 299,99 euros sur Decathlon.

item.title: Missed it on Prime Day? The Oura Ring 4 is still up to 44% off on Amazon, with discounts on all finishes, including Ceramic
item.description: The Ring 4 is still at a very low price in the UK, even after the rest of the Prime Day deals have finished.

item.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
item.description: TIDAL's new policy will prevent AI-generated music from making money on its service.

item.title: Starbucks is bringing back the famous Smores Frappuccino — how to get early access on June 30
item.description: Starbucks is bringing back the S'mores Frappuccino. Here's how to order it early (and why you should definitely tip your barista).

item.title: WhatsApp just opened username reservations for three billion people — here’s how to claim your handle before it's taken
item.description: WhatsApp is tightening the screws on its privacy with the announcement of usernames.

item.title: 'The goal is not to replace humans': new Meta AI research chief Dawn Song says the next frontier is AI agents that are "economically valuable"
item.description: Meta's AI Research VP believes AI should augment human value and that many benchmarks are irrelevant as companies struggle to prove ROI.

item.title: The DOJ is cracking down on illegal World Cup streams in Operation Offsides
item.description: The DOJ seized nearly 400 illegal World Cup streaming domains in Operation Offsides, citing copyright and cybersecurity risks.

item.title: In major privacy win, Supreme Court rules geofence warrants are protected by privacy rights
item.description: The Supreme Court's decision to limit geofence warrants is a win for privacy advocates, who called their use unconstitutional but sought an outright ban.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs vidéoprojecteurs en 2026 ? Notre guide d’achat
item.description: Même si les TV sont de plus en plus grandes, le meilleur moyen de reproduire une expérience cinéma chez soi reste d'utiliser un projecteur. Ces derniers sont aussi plus compacts et plus discrets. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs vidéoprojecteurs : du projecteur 4K haut de gamme au modèle nomade pas cher.

item.title: Half of social media child safety features don't work, report claims
item.description: A new report found half of social media safety features intended to keep children safe online do not work as claimed.

item.title: Pénurie de RAM ou énorme complot ? Les trois géants de la mémoire traînés en justice pour entente illégale
item.description: L'explosion des prix de la mémoire vive se termine devant les tribunaux. Une action collective en Californie accuse Samsung, SK Hynix et Micron d'avoir artificiellement restreint l'offre de DRAM au profit de l'IA pour gonfler leurs marges.

item.title: Manufacturers are killing mini PC and laptop performance with single-channel memory, and I'm sick of it
item.description: Some manufacturers are using single-channel memory to keep prices low - but it can have big repurcussions for performance.

item.title: Usernames Are Coming to WhatsApp Soon. Here's How to Reserve Yours
item.description: Even if you only use WhatsApp sometimes, you might want to snag your username now to stop giving out your phone number.

item.title: WhatsApp is launching usernames: here’s how to reserve yours
item.description: WhatsApp is introducing a new way to add and chat with contacts, without having to share your phone number. Usernames will be launching "later this year," in a move to make the communications platform "even more private," allowing you to keep your phone number concealed from people who aren't already in your contacts. Usernames are […]

item.title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
item.description: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. In the coming weeks, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (D-PA) are planning to debut a new version of the Health and Location […]

item.title: WhatsApp now lets you reserve usernames
item.description: WhatsApp username can be between 3 to 35 characters length

item.title: WhatsApp introduces usernames so you can chat without phone numbers
item.description: WhatsApp is launching usernames later this year, but you can reserve yours starting this week.

item.title: Dbrand cancels Companion Cube because it didn’t actually ask Valve for permission
item.description: Dbrand announced Monday that it's refunding everyone who bought its Steam Machine Companion Cube, which it said it made "without a license from Valve." Dbrand announced the Portal-themed Steam Machine accessory in November and took preorders for it last Monday. But a few days later, the product had disappeared from the company's website and the […]

item.title: 'This should be illegal': Sony is deleting over 500 movies that people bought from their digital libraries — just proving further why 4K Blu-ray's popularity keeps growing
item.description: Sony is removing hundreds of StudioCanal titles from customers' libraries on September 1, 2026, without compensation.

item.title: Fnac et Darty se montrent bien généreux lors des soldes : les 18 deals qui valent le coup
item.description: Les soldes battent leur plein chez Fnac et Darty ! On y trouve un tas d'offres Tech à des prix particulièrement attractifs. Besoin d'un nouveau smartphone ou d'un PC portable performant pour la rentrée ? Ne cherchez plus, voici notre sélection des meilleures offres du moment à ne pas laisser filer.

item.title: Did PlayStation outsell Xbox 8 to 1 with GTA VI pre-orders? Microsoft rebuts claims.
item.description: Microsoft has denied a claim that the PS5 version of 'Grand Theft Auto VI' is badly outselling the Xbox version in pre-orders.

item.title: Amnezia VPN quietly restores the one feature router and TV users were waiting for
item.description: Amnezia VPN has fully restored its configuration files, the key that lets routers, TVs, and other devices that can't use the standard app connect. Here's what changed and why it matters.

item.title: Did you catch the Michelin star man in The Bear Season 4? We did.
item.description: "The Bear" keeps up its quest for a Michelin star in Season 4. But the Michelin inspector may be closer than the staff knows...

item.title: Mars is changing M&M’s, Skittles, and Starburst this summer
item.description: The candy giant is introducing synthetic-dye-free products as major food brands respond to pressure over artificial colors. MAHA is shaking up your bag of M&M’s.
